problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 43: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE requires expressions to refer to valid typed symbols; the guarantee 'acc_out_data_x = acc_out_data_x' is trivially true but uses port names in a component type annex without relating them to any actual source or flow from subcomponents
problems.minimal_edit: replace 'acc_out_data_x = acc_out_data_x' with 'acc_out_data_x = Spg.acc_out_data_x' but only if Spg.acc_out_data_x is visible; since it is not, remove the clause as it cannot be meaningfully expressed in component type scope

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 44: named thing must be an expression with a type

problems.minimal_edit: remove 'acc_out_data_y = acc_out_data_y' because it cannot be rewritten to a valid expression using only visible symbols in component type scope
